feed.title: Hongru's Blog
feed.subtitle: Slow is smooth and smooth is fast.

entry.title: The one first post
entry.content:
Welcome to my blog！🤝 <

Hongru is a statistics student, while posting the first ever blog of his, he is writing master's thesis in HASTE project in Uppsala University. He has a simple wish of proudly graduating in summer 2020.

Words on the street is that Hongru makes best noodles.
